item.title:
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 49min Inter Miami do not plan to appoint a new head coach in the short term.
Guiller
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 49min Inter Miami do not plan to appoint a new head coach in the short term.
Guillermo Hoyos will be in charge of leading the team and will have the opportunity to prove himself over the coming months before the club makes a final decision. 238 122 1 mil 123 mil
